name: hotcell-monorepo
description: Self-hostable sandbox infrastructure for AI agents. Run many isolated, observable sandboxes on your own hardware.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @hotcell/sdk && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check:prompts: npm run build --workspace @hotcell/sdk && npm run build --workspace hotcell && node packages/cli/dist/prompts-check.js
scripts.check:env: npm run build --workspace @hotcell/sdk && npm run build --workspace hotcell && node packages/cli/dist/env-check.js
scripts.check:agent: npm run build --workspace @hotcell/daemon && (cd agent && go build -o /tmp/hotcell-agent-check ./cmd/hotcell-agent) && node packages/daemon/dist/agent-check.js
scripts.check:applevz: npm run build:vz && npm run build --workspace @hotcell/daemon && node packages/daemon/dist/applevz-check.js
scripts.smoke:fc:full: npm run build && SBX_SMOKE_DRIVER=firecracker node packages/daemon/dist/smoke-microvm.js
scripts.build:vz: cd helpers/hotcell-vz && swift build -c release && mkdir -p dist && cp .build/release/hotcell-vz dist/hotcell-vz && codesign --sign - --entitlements hotcell-vz.entitlements --force dist/hotcell-vz && echo 'signed dist/hotcell-vz'
scripts.build:agent: cd agent && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -o dist/hotcell-agent-linux-arm64 ./cmd/hotcell-agent && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/hotcell-agent-linux-amd64 ./cmd/hotcell-agent
